activities_projects.title: List of Main Characters
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the story
steps: Read the story carefully
List the main characters mentioned
Write one line about each character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies main characters and their roles
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct listing with brief description (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Mme Loisel
activities_projects.objective: Understand the character of Mme Loisel
steps: Read the passages related to Mme Loisel
Write 4–5 sentences describing her nature and desires

activities_projects.title: Role of Mr Loisel
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of Mr Loisel in the story
steps: Identify how Mr Loisel supports his wife
Write three points describing his character

activities_projects.title: Reason for Mme Loisel’s Unhappiness
activities_projects.objective: Understand the cause of Mme Loisel’s dissatisfaction
steps: Recall the opening part of the story
Write 3–4 sentences explaining why she is unhappy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands cause and effect in the story

activities_projects.title: The Invitation Scene
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of the invitation
steps: Read the scene where the invitation arrives
Write why the invitation is important to Mme Loisel
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands key turning point in the story

activities_projects.title: Borrowed Necklace
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of the necklace
steps: Recall how Mme Loisel gets the necklace
Write 3–4 sentences about its role in the story

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: Identify four major events in the story
Arrange them in correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
steps: Pick five new words from the story
Write their meanings and use each in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the moral message of the story
steps: Think about the ending of the story
Write the moral in your own words

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Connection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real-life situations
steps: Think about desire, honesty, or contentment in real life
Write 3–4 sentences connecting it to the story
